name_en: Seki Slab Stupa Monument
description_en: An archaeological artifact, a slab stupa (itabi) memorial stone. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

description_en: An archaeological artifact, a slab stupa (itabi) memorial stone. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

description_en: An archaeological artifact, a slab stupa (itabi) memorial stone. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Bronze Mirror with Auspicious Flowers and Mandarin Ducks, Five-Lobed Form
description_en: An archaeological artifact, a five-lobed bronze mirror decorated with auspicious flowers and mandarin ducks. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

description_en: An archaeological artifact, a waniguchi ritual gong. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1965-02-03.

description_en: An archaeological artifact, a slab stupa (itabi) memorial stone. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1989-07-24.

name_en: Wooden Measure (Excavated from the Donomae Site)
description_en: An archaeological artifact, a wooden measure excavated from the Donomae site. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1989-07-24.

name_en: Bracket Arm (Excavated from the Donomae Site)
description_en: An archaeological artifact, a wooden bracket arm excavated from the Donomae site. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1989-07-24.

name_en: Paddy-Field Clogs (Excavated from the Donomae Site)
description_en: An archaeological artifact, paddy-field clogs (tageta) excavated from the Donomae site. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1989-07-24.

description_en: An archaeological artifact, a jar excavated from the Donomae site. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1989-07-24.

name_en: Inscribed Roof Tile (Excavated from the Hachimori Site)
description_en: An archaeological artifact, a roof tile with incised characters excavated from the Hachimori site. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1989-07-24.

name_en: Cross-Patterned Beaten Jar (Excavated from the Tatenokoshi Sutra Mound)
description_en: An archaeological artifact, a jar with cross-pattern beaten decoration excavated from the Tatenokoshi sutra mound. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1989-07-24.

description_en: An archaeological artifact, a medieval jar excavated from the Tatenokoshi sutra mound. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1989-07-24.

name_en: Sue Ware Vessel (Rokusho Shrine)
description_en: An archaeological artifact, a Sue ware vessel held at Rokusho Shrine. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1989-07-24.

name_en: Amida Slab Stupa Monument of the Seventh Year of Kokoku
description_en: An archaeological artifact, an Amida slab stupa (itabi) dated to the seventh year of the Kokoku era. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1980-10-24.

name_romaji: Ken Hachimangū hōken oyobi Ken Hachimangū no ki
name_en: Sacred Sword of Ken Hachiman Shrine and the Record of Ken Hachiman Shrine
description_en: An archaeological artifact comprising the sacred sword of Ken Hachiman Shrine and its accompanying record. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1984-02-29.

description_en: An archaeological artifact, a slab stupa (itabi) depicting the Amida triad at Yamaya Hachimanmori. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1991-03-15.

description_en: An archaeological artifact, a six-sided stone pillar (dō) bearing Jizo images. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 2000-10-24.

name_en: Jizo Memorial Tablet
description_en: A historical material, a Jizo memorial tablet. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Pictorial Map of the Rice Storage Yard
description_en: A historical material, a pictorial map of the rice storage yard. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Meireki-Era Pictorial Map of Sakata Town
description_en: A historical material, a pictorial map of Sakata town from the Meireki era. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Gate Pass Plaque of Kamegasaki Castle
description_en: A historical material, a gate pass plaque of Kamegasaki Castle. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Inscription and Preface of Shorin
description_en: A historical material, an inscription with its preface titled Shorin. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Letter of Rai Shunsui
description_en: A historical material, a personal letter by Rai Shunsui. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Letter of Nakayama Koyo
description_en: A historical material, a letter by Nakayama Koyo. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Letter of Watanabe Kazan
description_en: A historical material, a personal letter by Watanabe Kazan. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_romaji: Ikoma Taihi hitsu Sakata daishinsai jikkyō zu
name_en: Pictorial Record of the Sakata Great Earthquake by Ikoma Taihi
description_en: A historical material, a pictorial depiction of the actual conditions of the Sakata great earthquake, brushed by Ikoma Taihi. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Photographs of the Sakata Great Earthquake
description_en: A historical material, photographs of the Sakata great earthquake. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_romaji: Mogamigawa outa tsuki Tōgū dairin no tokoro
name_en: Record of the Crown Prince's Visit with an Attached Poem on the Mogami River
description_en: A historical material recording the crown prince's visit, with an attached poem on the Mogami River. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.

name_en: Model of Mount Chokai
description_en: A historical material, a model of Mount Chokai. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1965-02-03.

name_en: Portrait of Honma Mitsuoka with Encomium by Kogan
description_en: A historical material, a portrait of Honma Mitsuoka bearing an encomium by Kogan. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1965-02-03.

name_en: Shonai Boshin War Materials
description_en: A historical material, documents relating to the Boshin War in the Shonai domain. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1965-12-09.

name_romaji: Nagaoka tenpō soshi ikken shiryō kei jūitten
name_en: Materials on the Prevention of the Nagaoka Domain Transfer, Eleven Items
description_en: A historical material comprising eleven documents concerning efforts to prevent the transfer of the Nagaoka domain. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1967-02-25.

name_romaji: Sanretsushi jisei shikishi yonmai harigō gaku
name_en: Framed Panel of Four Death-Poem Cards of the Three Martyrs
description_en: A historical material, a framed panel mounting four death-poem cards (shikishi) of the three martyrs. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1967-02-25.

name_romaji: Sakata Sodenoura Koyanohama no zu tsuki Kisagata no zu
name_en: Views of Sakata Sodenoura and Koyanohama, with an Attached View of Kisagata
description_en: A historical material, pictorial views of Sakata Sodenoura and Koyanohama, with an attached view of Kisagata. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1990-04-26.

name_romaji: Meireki ninen Sakata machi taika ezu (dai shō)
name_en: Pictorial Maps of the Great Sakata Town Fire of the Second Year of Meireki (Large and Small)
description_en: A historical material, large and small pictorial maps of the great fire in Sakata town in the second year of the Meireki era. It is a municipally designated tangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 2005-10-19.

name_en: Ogino-School Gunnery of the Matsuyama Domain
description_en: An intangible cultural property in the field of craft techniques, the Ogino-school gunnery of the Matsuyama domain. It is a municipally designated intangible cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 2003-11-18.

name_romaji: Katō Sessō hitsu Hie jinja taisai gyōretsu e kakegaku
name_en: Hanging Votive Panel of the Hie Shrine Grand Festival Procession by Kato Sesso
description_en: A tangible folk cultural property, a hanging votive panel depicting the grand festival procession of Hie Shrine, brushed by Kato Sesso. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Sakata City, Yamagata Prefecture. It was designated on 1963-03-09.
